# JsonValues.SafeIntegerMin field

Inclusive lower bound for safe identifiers and counters: `−(2^53 − 1)` (§2.5, R-2.5-c). Equal to JavaScript's `Number.MIN_SAFE_INTEGER`.

```csharp
public const long SafeIntegerMin;
```
